endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies
endpoints.description: Gets all the Firewall Policies in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies
endpoints.description: Lists all Firewall Policies in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the specified Firewall Policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}/ruleGroups
endpoints.description: Lists all FirewallPolicyRuleGroups in a FirewallPolicy resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}/ruleGroups/{ruleGroupName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RULEGROUPNAME}} with a real rulegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}/ruleGroups/{ruleGroupName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the specified FirewallPolicyRuleGroup.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RULEGROUPNAME}} with a real rulegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/{firewallPolicyName}/ruleGroups/{ruleGroupName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RULEGROUPNAME}} with a real rulegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLPOLICYNAME}} with a real firewallpolicyname.
